input.tenant_message: The deadbolt on my front door stopped working last night — the key turns but nothing catches and the bolt won't extend. I can still lock the door using the knob lock but I don't feel safe relying on just that. This needs to be fixed as soon as possible since I live alone.

ai_output.recommended_action: Dispatch a licensed locksmith within 24 hours to inspect and replace the deadbolt mechanism. Confirm tenant has a functional secondary lock in the interim and advise them not to leave the unit unattended until repaired.
